nasb.text: He has made His wonders to be remembered; The Lord is gracious and compassionate.

esv.text: He has caused his wondrous works to be remembered; the Lord is gracious and merciful.

cnv.text: 他使人記念他所行的奇事； 耶和華有恩典，有憐憫。

ccb.text: 祂的奇妙作为令人无法忘怀。 耶和华充满怜悯和恩惠。

csbs.text: 他使人记念他的奇妙之事； 耶和华有恩惠、有怜悯。
